# UPchieve Changelog, week of Jul 7 to 14, 2026

*Generated by Claude from merge-request and commit activity. Details may be inaccurate; check the linked MR or ask the author.*

Last deploys: high-line Jul 6, subway Jul 7.

**Status key:** 🚀 Launched (live to everyone) | 🧪 Experimental (in production, behind a feature flag) | 🎁 Merged (ships next deploy) | ✅ Approved (reviewed, not yet merged) | 👀 In review (needs review)

---

## Student → Volunteer (S2V)

Lets a student become a volunteer coach on the same account, switching modes instead of creating a second one, so they can earn verified volunteer service hours.

- 🚀 **Moved the UPchieve logos into `/assets/logos`**, so avatars can swap cleanly across roles and modes. ([high-line !1708](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1708)) *Jamie Kasulis*
- 🚀 **Label the student signup email field "Email."** ([high-line !1713](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1713)) *Macy Lam*
- 🧪 **Mode switching.** A custom avatar in the account menu toggles between student and coach mode, with animated transitions on switch. Rolled out to 25% of BigFuture students who have completed at least one session, plus everyone in the "expressed interest in becoming tutors" cohort. The prompt copy is split 50/50 between *"Want to earn volunteer service hours with UPchieve?"* and *"Want to boost your college apps? Earn verified service hours on UPchieve!"* ([`students-become-volunteers`](https://us.posthog.com/project/1362/feature_flags/115051)) ([high-line !1718](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1718), [high-line !1722](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1722), [high-line !1721](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1721), [high-line !1710](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1710)) *Jamie Kasulis*
- 🧪 **Coach theming.** An account in volunteer mode gets a distinct coach theme on its dashboard. Rolled out to no one yet. ([`s2v-theming`](https://us.posthog.com/project/1362/feature_flags/736525)) ([high-line !1712](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1712)) *sammy nave*
- ✅ **Banner ad** promoting the switch to students. ([high-line !1720](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1720)) *sammy nave*
- **Account menu polish:** ✅ "Account" dropped from the user role label ([high-line !1760](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1760)); 👀 the caret anchored so it stops drifting as the menu resizes ([high-line !1759](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1759)). *Macy Lam*

## API response contracts

A typed, tested contract for every API route's response.

- 🚀 **Assignments and current session** contracts and mappers, plus a calendar contract. ([subway !2621](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2621)) *Trey Stevens*
- 🎁 **Moderation** contracts and mappers. ([subway !2790](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2790)) *Trey Stevens*
- 👀 **22 more open MRs** covering the remaining domains: sessions, students, teachers, subjects, surveys, training, tutor-bot, users, volunteers, auth, eligibility, feature flags, and others. They are stacked, and each one is easiest to review commit by commit. *Trey Stevens*

## End-to-end test suite

A browser test suite that drives high-line against a real subway, plus the work to make it run in CI.

- 🚀 **Skip recaptcha in the E2E environment**, so signup and login tests can complete. ([subway !2780](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2780)) *Jamie Kasulis*
- 🎁 **Core flows covered:** sessions, login, volunteer signup and training, notifications, availability, student signup. ([high-line !1747](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1747), [high-line !1755](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1755), [high-line !1766](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1766), [high-line !1754](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1754), [high-line !1740](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1740), [high-line !1764](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1764), [high-line !1763](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1763), [high-line !1757](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1757)) *sammy nave, Jamie Kasulis*
- 🎁 **Harness fixes:** subway's run logs are written to a file so failures are diagnosable, zombie processes from local runs are cleaned up, the chat test waits for the socket before typing, the suite runs under pnpm, `isE2eEnvironment` now covers CI not just local. ([high-line !1751](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1751), [high-line !1744](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1744), [high-line !1768](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1768), [high-line !1734](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1734), [subway !2783](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2783)) *sammy nave, Jamie Kasulis*

## TypeScript conversion

Moving high-line from JavaScript to TypeScript.

- ✅ **The remaining high-line services converted to TypeScript.** ([high-line !1732](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1732)) *Jamie Kasulis*

## Postgres read replica

A replica of the production database, so dev, testing, and debugging run against realistic data, and as the start of an analytics environment.

- 🎁 **Publisher setup** on the primary. ([subway !2786](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2786)) *Alex Lindsay*
- ✅ **Subscriber setup** on the replica. ([subway !2804](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2804)) *Alex Lindsay*
- ✅ **A read-only role** scoped to the `upchieve` schema, which the subscriber connects as. ([subway !2785](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2785)) *Alex Lindsay*
- ✅ **Publication maintenance script** to run after migrations, since a newly added table has to be re-registered for replication. ([subway !2787](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2787)) *Alex Lindsay*
- 👀 **The Pulumi Postgres service** for the replica itself. ([GCS !187](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/grand-central-station/-/merge_requests/187)) *Alex Lindsay*
- 👀 **Migrations run against the replica on dev.** ([GCS !188](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/grand-central-station/-/merge_requests/188)) *Alex Lindsay*

## Load testing

UPchieve's load-testing framework, built with Artillery, so infrastructure can be exercised under realistic load.

- 🚀 **Report load-test metrics to New Relic:** Artillery's New Relic publish-metrics plugin added to the session-lifecycle scenario ([VCP !10](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/van-cortlandt-park/-/merge_requests/10)); a custom `artillery-plugin-new-relic-summary` plugin sends each run's final aggregate summary ([VCP !11](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/van-cortlandt-park/-/merge_requests/11)); count metrics fixed to report over the right interval ([VCP !12](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/van-cortlandt-park/-/merge_requests/12)). *Kasozi Wilson*
- 🚀 **Run the load-test cron reliably:** the cron calls pnpm by absolute path ([VCP !8](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/van-cortlandt-park/-/merge_requests/8)) and loads nvm so the right Node version is on PATH ([VCP !9](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/van-cortlandt-park/-/merge_requests/9)). *Kasozi Wilson*

---

## Quick wins, fixes, chores, and other small things

- 🚀 **The academic integrity training now covers AI.** A "Use AI Responsibly" section tells coaches that UPbot is for alternative explanations, practice problems, clarifying language, and refreshing their memory, but not for writing or rewriting essays, giving feedback on essays, or generating full explanations. ([high-line !1714](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1714)) *Jamie Kasulis*
- **Teacher views cleanup:** 🎁 routing rebuilt on nested routes ([high-line !1724](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1724)); 🎁 breadcrumbs moved to the parent view ([high-line !1725](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1725)); 🎁 `router.js` converted to `router.ts` ([high-line !1716](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1716)); 🎁 non-teachers guarded out of teacher routes ([high-line !1717](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1717)); 🚀 assignments-view loader fixed ([high-line !1727](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1727)); ✅ class-details tab selection fixed ([high-line !1728](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1728)); ✅ header icon and title made consistent ([high-line !1726](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1726)). *Alex Lindsay*
- ✅ **Sign-in improvements:** a show/hide toggle on the password field, login failures announced in an accessible alert instead of failing quietly, and a placeholder plus clearer invalid-state styling on the password input ([high-line !1742](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1742)); a reusable Vuetify form checkbox ([high-line !1741](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1741)). *Liseidy Bueno*
- 👀 **Screen image uploads with PhotoDNA before they are stored.** Uploads move to the backend so they can be screened, covering session photos and volunteer photo IDs. [#658](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/issues/-/work_items/658) ([subway !2757](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2757), [subway !2758](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2758); [high-line !1709](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1709), [high-line !1711](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1711)) *Liseidy Bueno*
- 🎁 **Highlight the currently open subject in the progress report sidebar** was merged and then reverted twenty minutes later, so nothing changes for now. ([high-line !1696](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1696), reverted in [high-line !1767](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1767)) *Kasozi Wilson*

### Fixes

- **Enforced bans everywhere.** 🚀 complete- and shadow-banned volunteers are no longer texted ([subway !2771](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2771)); 🎁 the ban states that block joining a session were tightened ([subway !2772](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2772)); ✅ shadow-banned coaches can no longer pick up sessions or receive session notifications ([high-line !1775](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1775)). *Jamie Kasulis*
- 🚀 **Demote Socket.IO engine connection errors to warnings.** They were logged at error level and drowning out real errors. ([subway !2779](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2779)) *Kasozi Wilson*
- 🚀 **Run SQL lint only on changed files, with a timeout.** It ran over every file and could hang the build if pg-formatter stalled. ([subway !2746](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2746)) *Chris*
- 🎁 **Reroute subject aliases to the quizzes they actually use.** Locked AP subjects with a shared quiz were dead ends: the session went unresponsive with no quiz prompt. It now resolves and loads the quiz the subject actually uses. 🐛 [#680](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/issues/-/work_items/680) ([subway !2774](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2774), [subway !2773](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2773); [high-line !1729](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1729), [high-line !1730](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1730), [high-line !1731](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1731)) *Chris*
- 🎁 **Give the volunteer background form's "How did you hear about us?" question a dropdown, and make it required.** It had been asking with nothing to answer it with. 🐛 [#667](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/issues/-/work_items/667) ([high-line !1773](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1773)) *Kasozi Wilson*
- 🎁 **Surface the real reason a session pickup failed.** It showed a generic error instead of the failure reason, because network errors were returned as plain objects and lost the server's message. They are now thrown as real errors, so the message reaches the user. 🐛 [#644](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/issues/-/work_items/644) ([high-line !1719](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1719)) *Trey Stevens*
- 🎁 **Require grade and school in student signup.** Elementary students could otherwise sign up by choosing "Other" as their grade. 🐛 [#671](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/issues/-/work_items/671) ([high-line !1723](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1723)) *sammy nave*
- 🎁 **Prebundle Vuetify deep imports.** They were causing a flaky unit-test CI job. ([high-line !1762](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1762)) *Chris*
- 🎁 **Block DML in migrations.** Migrations could previously contain data-manipulation statements; now they cannot. ([subway !2784](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2784)) *Alex Lindsay*
- 🎁 **Remove a stale `refresh_materialized_views` reference.** ([high-line !1736](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1736)) *Jamie Kasulis*
- 🎁 **Trace the process-session-ended job.** It had no visibility into where its time went. ([subway !2788](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2788)) *Kasozi Wilson*
- ✅ **Remove dead code from the coach invitation test.** ([subway !2805](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2805), [high-line !1776](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1776)) *Jamie Kasulis*
- 👀 **Make the photo ID modal respect the back button.** It ignored both the in-modal back control and the browser back button, doing nothing or navigating away; both now close it. 🐛 [#641](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/issues/-/work_items/641) ([high-line !1758](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1758)) *Macy Lam*
- 👀 **Keep whiteboard controls visible in landscape orientation.** They disappeared when the screen rotated. ([high-line !1761](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1761)) *Iulia Rontu*

### Internal tools

- ✅ **Admin users table:** a column header row (USER ID, CREATED AT, NAME, EMAIL, ROLES), roles shown capitalized and comma-separated, long emails wrapped to two lines instead of overlapping adjacent columns, tighter row padding with a bottom border, and pagination below the table ([high-line !1715](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1715)); user search now returns a roles array ([subway !2764](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2764)). *Macy Lam*

### Chores

- 🚀 **Retired the `zwibbler-text-node-moderation` feature flag.** It had been rolled out to everyone. ([high-line !1702](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1702)) *Jamie Kasulis*
- ✅ **Updated `firebase-admin` and set pnpm's `trustPolicy` to `no-downgrade`.** ([subway !2721](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2721), [subway !2722](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2722)) *Alex Lindsay*
- ✅ **Added Taskforce local-queue notes to the README.** ([subway !2776](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2776)) *sammy nave*
